description_long: This is a black wireless game controller, featuring a matte plastic body with two ergonomic hand grips. The front face displays two analog thumbsticks, a directional pad, four colored action buttons labeled A, B, X, and Y, and a central Xbox logo button. Additional smaller buttons for menu and view functions are present, along with shoulder and trigger buttons on the top edge. The rear side shows a battery compartment and a USB port for wired connectivity or charging. The overall design is sleek and contoured for comfortable handheld use, with all controls easily accessible from the front.
description: A black ergonomic wireless game controller with dual thumbsticks, colored action buttons, and a central Xbox logo button.
description_view_0: Front view showing all main controls: thumbsticks, D-pad, action buttons, and the Xbox logo button.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the right grip, button layout, and the raised profile of the thumbsticks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, USB port, and the contours of the hand grips.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the left, emphasizing the left grip and the side profile of the controller.
